shell.verse: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
shell.tagline: One portal for serving and growing together.

hero.verse: I rejoiced with those who said to me, "Let us go to the house of the Lord."

giveNow.noteBody: Admins reconcile transfers against the bank statement and post each entry to your history. If you don't see it after a few days, you can ping the church admin via WhatsApp.

help.title: How to use the editor
help.subtitleWysiwyg: Type normally, then format using the toolbar:

tipsWysiwyg.select: Select the text you want to format, then click Bold/Italic — text updates instantly.
tipsWysiwyg.list: For lists, click the bullet/numbered button then start typing each line.
tipsWysiwyg.link: To insert a link, select the text first, click the link icon, then enter the URL.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Quick start, module overview, and common tasks.
help.modulesDescription: A guided tour of every section in the admin.
help.commonTasksDescription: Step-by-step playbooks for the things you will do most.
help.supportDescription: Reach out to the developer who set up this deployment.
help.supportBody: For bug reports or feature requests, contact the IT lead at your church or the developer who handed off this system.

quickStart.title: Quick start
quickStart.description: Five steps to get your church running on this system.
quickStart.step1: Add core members at /admin/members. Households and cell groups can be set up after.
quickStart.step2: Set up your services at /admin/attendance/services so you can record check-ins on Sundays.
quickStart.step3: Configure giving funds at /admin/giving so persembahan are categorized correctly.
quickStart.step4: Customize bank account, QRIS, and confirmation WhatsApp at /admin/settings.
quickStart.step5: Invite staff at /admin/settings/users — they sign in with email + password.

members.title: Members
members.description: Add, edit, and search members. The starting point for almost everything else.

households.title: Households
households.description: Group members by family. Used by children check-in to find guardians.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Create services and record who came on Sundays.

giving.title: Giving
giving.description: Record persembahan against funds and reconcile bank transfers.

cellGroups.title: Cell groups
cellGroups.description: Komsel structure, members, and meeting reports.

events.title: Events
events.description: Create church events and track RSVPs.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: Publish church-wide announcements that members see in their portal inbox.

children.title: Children check-in
children.description: Class management, live check-in counter, and history.

pastoral.title: Pastoral care
pastoral.description: Track visits and follow-ups with members.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Operational config, user management, and audit log.

addMember.title: Add a new member
addMember.description: Members → New member. Fill in name, gender, birth date, phone — link to a household if applicable.

recordAttendance.title: Record Sunday attendance
recordAttendance.description: Attendance → pick the service for this Sunday → Check-in. Scan QR codes or search by name.

recordGiving.title: Record a persembahan
recordGiving.description: Giving → New giving. Pick the member (or anonymous), the fund, the amount, and the method.

broadcastMessage.title: Send a WhatsApp broadcast
broadcastMessage.description: Communications → New broadcast. Pick a template and a member group, then preview and send.

checkInChild.title: Check a child in for kids ministry
checkInChild.description: Children → Check-in. Pick the child, drop-off guardian, and class. The system issues a 4-character safety code.
